Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Akani Simbine blasts Team SA into 4x100m relay final

The South African men’s 4x100m relay team qualified for the final after a blistering final leg in qualifying by Akani Simbine on Thursday.

The South African men’s 4x100m relay team qualified for the final after a blistering final leg in qualifying byAkani Simbineon Thursday.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Drawn in the first of two heats, the South African quartet were close to last when Simbine took the baton.

However, South Africa’s star 100m runner blasted down the finishing straight to cross the line in second place behind the USA.

The top three finishers in each heat, plus the next two fastest times, qualified for the final.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

When all was said and done, South Africa wound up with the second-fastest overall time of37.94, giving them a real shot a medal in the final.

The South African team comprised Bayanda Walaza , Shaun Maswangani, Bradley Nkoana and Akani Simbine.

The USA posted the quickest time of37.47.

Joining the USA and South Africa in the final will be Great Britain, China, France, Canada, Japan and Italy.

Jamaica sensationally missed out on a place in the final.

The final will be held onFriday, 9 Augustat19:47(SA time).

title: Akani Simbine blasts Team SA into 4x100m relay final
author: Garrin Lambley
description: The South African men's 4x100m relay team qualified for the final after a blistering final leg in qualifying by Akani Simbine on Thursday.
